zh.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol於1140年出生在法國布列塔尼。他和Jeanne至少有1個兒子。他去世於1167年享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol于1140年出生在法国布列塔尼。他和Jeanne至少有1个儿子。他去世于1167年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Adrianus, Cornelis, Hendrick, Pieter.
Shortened form of Flemish and Dutch   Van Mol  .

Dutch and Flemish: nickname from Middle Dutch mol ‘mole’, perhaps for a very short-sighted or blind person, or someone with dark hair, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a mole.

variants.name: Van Mol
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Mol in Antwerp province, Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol was born in 1140, in Brittany, France. He had at least 1 son with Jeanne. He died in 1167, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol est né en 1140, à Bretagne, France. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jeanne. Il est décédé en 1167, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol wurde 1140 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mit Jeanne mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol è nato il nel 1140 nel Bretagne, Francia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jeanne. Morì nel 1167, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dolは1140年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた。彼はJeanneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1167年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol(은)는 1140년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났다. 그는 Jeanne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1167년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol nasceu em 1140, em Bretagne, França. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jeanne. Ele faleceu em 1167, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol родился в 1140 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jeanne. Он умер в 1167 г. в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Senechal Alain de Beaufort de Dol nació en 1140, en Bretagne, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Jeanne. Murió en 1167, a la edad de 27 años.
